channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  5. Apple Reportedly Sees Hybrid iPad Mac as a Risk to Record Revenues  The Mac Observer

item.title: PSA: Most Wi-Fi routers vulnerable to AirSnitch attack – here’s what to do - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. PSA: Most Wi-Fi routers vulnerable to AirSnitch attack – here’s what to do  9to5Mac
  2. New AirSnitch attack bypasses Wi-Fi encryption in homes, offices, and enterprises  Ars Technica
  3. Your Wi-Fi router's guest network may not be as secure as you think  AppleInsider
  4. Researchers discover massive Wi-Fi vulnerability affecting multiple access points — AirSnitch lets attackers on the same network intercept data and launch machine-in-the-middle attacks  Tom's Hardware
  5. Wi-Fi Client Isolation vulnerability ‘AirSnitch’ exposes networks to new attacks  SC Media
